wall.name: Standard Wall Cabinet
wall.notes: Standard wall cabinet, all widths 9-42 inches. Heights 12-48 inches. Standard installation 30 or 36 inches high.

wall_blind_corner.name: Wall Blind Corner
wall_blind_corner.notes: L-shaped blind corner. 13 inch door side, 3 inch blind pull, 7.5 inch mullion, 18.75 inch opening.

stacked_wall.name: Stacked Wall Cabinet
stacked_wall.notes: Two stacked sections: 12 inch upper plus variable lower (12+30=42, 12+36=48, 12+42=54, 12+48=60, 12+54=66).

stacked_wall_blind_corner.name: Stacked Wall Blind Corner
stacked_wall_blind_corner.notes: Stacked blind corner configuration with same blind pull and mullion as WBC.

refrigerator_wall.name: Refrigerator Wall Cabinet
refrigerator_wall.notes: Deeper than standard wall (24, 27, or 30 inches) to sit flush with refrigerator appliance.

wall_spice.name: Wall Spice Cabinet
wall_spice.notes: Shallow spice rack cabinet for narrow width storage.

wall_pullout_spice_rack.name: Wall Pull-Out Spice Rack
wall_pullout_spice_rack.notes: Narrow pull-out spice rack with gliding mechanism.

base.name: Standard Base Cabinet
base.notes: Standard base cabinet. 30.5 inch body height, 4 inch toe kick = 34.5 inch total. 24 inch depth standard.

sink_base.name: Sink Base Cabinet
sink_base.notes: Open interior for plumbing installation. Same height/depth as standard base.

sink_base_fhd.name: Sink Base Full Height Door
sink_base_fhd.notes: Full height door variant of sink base cabinet.

sink_base_reverse.name: Sink Base Reverse
sink_base_reverse.notes: Reverse configuration sink base for mirrored layouts.

sink_base_apron.name: Sink Base Apron
sink_base_apron.notes: Apron front cutout for farmhouse-style sink installation.

base_rollout_tray.name: Base Roll Out Tray Cabinet
base_rollout_tray.notes: Standard base cabinet with integrated roll-out tray system.

base_fhd.name: Base Full Height Door
base_fhd.notes: Full height door variant of standard base cabinet.

tray_base.name: Tray Base Cabinet
tray_base.notes: Specialized base for tray and baking sheet storage.

peninsula_base.name: Peninsula Base Cabinet
peninsula_base.notes: Finished on both sides for island or peninsula installation.

base_blind_corner.name: Base Blind Corner Cabinet
base_blind_corner.notes: L-shaped blind corner base. 24 inch depth each side, 4 inch blind pull, 7.5 inch mullion, 18.75 inch opening.

base_blind_corner_quarter_turn_shelf.name: Base Blind Corner with 1/4 Turn Shelf
base_blind_corner_quarter_turn_shelf.notes: BBC variant with 1/4 turn rotating shelf configuration.

base_blind_corner_wire_shelf.name: Base Blind Corner with Full Swing Wire Shelf
base_blind_corner_wire_shelf.notes: BBC variant with full-swing chrome wire shelf system.

base_blind_corner_magic_corner.name: Base Blind Corner with Magic Corner
base_blind_corner_magic_corner.notes: BBC variant with Magic Corner rotating tray system.

peninsula_blind_corner.name: Peninsula Base Blind Corner
peninsula_blind_corner.notes: Blind corner base finished on both sides for island/peninsula.

sink_base_blind_corner.name: Sink Base Blind Corner
sink_base_blind_corner.notes: Blind corner sink base (SBBC54 ≈ SB30 + blind, SBBC57 ≈ SB33 + blind, SBBC60 ≈ SB36 + blind).

drawer_base_3d.name: 3 Drawer Base Cabinet
drawer_base_3d.notes: Three full-width drawers in standard base cabinet body.

drawer_base_4d.name: 4 Drawer Base Cabinet
drawer_base_4d.notes: Four full-width drawers in standard base cabinet body.

drawer_base_2td.name: 2 Drawer Base with 2 Tiered Drawers
drawer_base_2td.notes: Two standard drawers plus two tiered/shallow drawers for small items.

drawer_base_2hd.name: 2 Drawer Base with Heavy Duty
drawer_base_2hd.notes: Two drawers with heavy-duty glide system for maximum weight capacity.

split_top_4drawer.name: Split Top 4 Drawer Base
split_top_4drawer.notes: Four drawers with split top configuration for divided upper storage.

breadboard_base.name: Base with Bread Board
breadboard_base.notes: Base cabinet with integrated fold-out bread board.

breadboard_3drawer.name: 3 Drawer Base with Bread Board
breadboard_3drawer.notes: Three drawer base with bread board insert.

breadboard_4drawer.name: 4 Drawer Base with Bread Board
breadboard_4drawer.notes: Four drawer base with bread board insert.

base_right_angle.name: Base Right Angle Corner
base_right_angle.notes: L-shaped right angle corner. 24 inch depth each direction. Requires wall space on both sides.

sink_base_right_angle.name: Sink Base Right Angle Corner
sink_base_right_angle.notes: L-shaped sink base right angle corner with open plumbing space.

base_right_angle_super_susan.name: Base Right Angle with Super Susan
base_right_angle_super_susan.notes: Right angle corner with integrated Super Susan rotating tray system.

base_right_angle_expandable.name: Base Right Angle Expandable Leg
base_right_angle_expandable.notes: Standard leg 36 inches, expandable to 42 inches. Total both legs not to exceed 78 inches.

base_right_angle_recycling.name: Base Right Angle Recycling
base_right_angle_recycling.notes: Right angle corner with integrated recycling bin system.

base_right_angle_corner_pantry.name: Base Right Angle with Corner Pantry
base_right_angle_corner_pantry.notes: Right angle corner with revolving corner pantry shelf system.

diagonal_sink_base.name: Diagonal Sink Base
diagonal_sink_base.notes: 45-degree diagonal corner with sink opening. Widths measured along each wall. 24 inch depth each side.

diagonal_sink_base_lazy_susan.name: Diagonal Sink Base with Lazy Susan
diagonal_sink_base_lazy_susan.notes: Diagonal sink base with lazy susan rotating tray.

diagonal_sink_base_super_susan.name: Diagonal Sink Base with Super Susan
diagonal_sink_base_super_susan.notes: Diagonal sink base with integrated Super Susan rotating tray system.

waste_base_door_mounted_wood.name: Door Mounted Wood Waste Cabinet
waste_base_door_mounted_wood.notes: Door-mounted waste bin in wood finish. FHD and Servo-Drive (BWDMWSD) variants available.

waste_base_door_mounted_aluminum.name: Door Mounted Aluminum Waste Cabinet
waste_base_door_mounted_aluminum.notes: Door-mounted waste bin in brushed aluminum. FHD variant available.

waste_base_door_mounted_plastic.name: Door Mounted Plastic Waste Cabinet
waste_base_door_mounted_plastic.notes: Door-mounted waste bin in durable plastic. FHD variant available.

wine_base_rack.name: Base Wine Rack Cabinet
wine_base_rack.notes: Shallow wine rack cabinet 13 inches deep (not standard 24 inch base depth).

wine_base_cross.name: Base Wine Cross Cabinet
wine_base_cross.notes: Wine cross storage configuration 13 inches deep.

wine_base_diagonal.name: Base Wine Diagonal Cabinet
wine_base_diagonal.notes: Diagonal wine bottle storage 13 inches deep.

wine_base_shelf.name: Base Wine Shelf Cabinet
wine_base_shelf.notes: Wine shelf storage with 13 inch depth.

wine_base_stack.name: Base Wine Stack Cabinet
wine_base_stack.notes: Stacked wine storage 24 inches deep with 12 inch false back.

wine_base_concave_shelf.name: Base Concave Wine Shelf
wine_base_concave_shelf.notes: Curved inward (concave) wine shelf. Dimensions: 15 15/16 inch min, 18 inch mid, 18.75 inch max.

wine_base_convex_shelf.name: Base Convex Wine Shelf
wine_base_convex_shelf.notes: Curved outward (convex) wine shelf. Dimensions: 15 inch min, 16 inch mid, 17 inch max.

oven_base.name: Base Oven Cabinet
oven_base.notes: Base cabinet with oven cutout opening for built-in oven installation.

base_warming_drawer.name: Base Warming Drawer Cabinet
base_warming_drawer.notes: Base cabinet with warming drawer cutout opening.

flush_inset_base_oven.name: Flush Inset Base Oven Cabinet
flush_inset_base_oven.notes: Flush inset base oven cabinet for seamless appliance integration.

flush_inset_base_warming_drawer.name: Flush Inset Base Warming Drawer Cabinet
flush_inset_base_warming_drawer.notes: Flush inset base warming drawer cabinet.

range_top_base.name: Range Top Base Cabinet
range_top_base.notes: Range or cooktop base cabinet. Standard 28.5 inches, can increase to 34.5 inches. Depth not over 27 inches.

base_no_door_valance.name: Base No Door with Valance
base_no_door_valance.notes: Open base cabinet with decorative valance. No door, open front.

base_no_door.name: Base No Door Cabinet
base_no_door.notes: Open base cabinet with no door for display or open shelving.

base_pullout_shelf.name: Base Pull-Out Shelf Cabinet
base_pullout_shelf.notes: Base cabinet with pull-out shelf mechanism. 22.25 inches when closed, 24 inches when extended.

base_wire_pullout_shelf.name: Base with Chrome Wire Pull-Out Shelf
base_wire_pullout_shelf.notes: Base cabinet with chrome wire pull-out shelf system.

angle_end_base.name: Angle End Base Cabinet
angle_end_base.notes: Angled end cabinet. 24 inch body, 12 inch face, 13 x 24 inch side, 46-degree angle.

angle_left_right_base.name: Left Angle Base Cabinet
angle_left_right_base.notes: 12-inch left angle base. 12 inch face, 13 inch side, 24 x 24 inch body.

angle_left_right_base.name: Right Angle Base Cabinet
angle_left_right_base.notes: 12-inch right angle base. 12 inch face, 13 inch side, 24 x 24 inch body.

base_end_shelf.name: Base End Shelf Left
base_end_shelf.notes: 9-inch end shelf with R6-inch curved front. Left orientation.

base_end_shelf.name: Base End Shelf Right
base_end_shelf.notes: 9-inch end shelf with R6-inch curved front. Right orientation.

base_end_shelf.name: Base End Shelf Peninsula
base_end_shelf.notes: 9-inch peninsula end shelf with R6-inch curved front.

base_knife_insert.name: Base Cabinet with Knife Insert
base_knife_insert.notes: Base cabinet with integrated knife block insert.

base_tray_divider.name: Base Cabinet with Chrome Tray Divider
base_tray_divider.notes: Base cabinet with chrome tray divider system for baking sheets.

utility_cabinet.name: Utility Cabinet
utility_cabinet.notes: Tall utility cabinet. Standard 24 inch depth, also 27 or 30 inches. Heights 84-102 inches.

utility_tall_cabinet.name: Utility Tall Cabinet
utility_tall_cabinet.notes: Extra-tall utility cabinet. Standard 24 inch depth, also 27 or 30 inches. Heights 84-114 inches.

utility_tall_closet.name: Utility Tall Clothes Closet Cabinet
utility_tall_closet.notes: Tall cabinet for clothes closet. Not available under 21 inch wide or under 24 inch deep.

utility_tall_broom_closet.name: Utility Tall Broom Closet Cabinet
utility_tall_broom_closet.notes: Tall cabinet for broom/utility closet. Not available under 21 inch wide or under 24 inch deep.

utility_3drawer.name: Utility Cabinet with 3 Drawers
utility_3drawer.notes: Utility cabinet with 3 drawers. Drawer stays standard depth if cabinet over 24 inches.

utility_fhd.name: Utility Cabinet with Full Height Door
utility_fhd.notes: Utility cabinet with full-height single door configuration.

utility_tall_rollout.name: Utility Tall with Roll Out Tray
utility_tall_rollout.notes: Utility tall cabinet with roll-out tray system. Not under 15 inch deep.

utility_wire_pantry_rack.name: Utility with Chrome Wire Pull-Out Pantry Rack
utility_wire_pantry_rack.notes: Utility cabinet with chrome wire pantry rack. Depth 24 inches only (not under 24 or over 27).

utility_tall_wire_pantry_rack.name: Utility Tall with Chrome Wire Pull-Out Pantry Rack
utility_tall_wire_pantry_rack.notes: Utility tall cabinet with chrome wire pantry rack. Depth 24 inches only (not under 24 or over 30).

utility_pullout_pantry.name: Utility with Pull-Out Pantry Rack
utility_pullout_pantry.notes: Utility cabinet with pull-out pantry rack. Depth 24 inches (not over 30).

utility_tall_pullout_pantry.name: Utility Tall with Pull-Out Pantry Rack
utility_tall_pullout_pantry.notes: Utility tall cabinet with pull-out pantry rack. Depth 24 inches (not over 30).

utility_tall_chefs_pantry.name: Utility Tall Chef's Pantry Cabinet
utility_tall_chefs_pantry.notes: 36-inch wide utility tall cabinet with chef's pantry organization. Depth 24 inches.

pantry_entry_cabinet.name: Pantry Entry Cabinet
pantry_entry_cabinet.notes: Pantry entry cabinet with finished interior and both ends for island installation.

oven_tall_cabinet.name: Oven Tall Cabinet
oven_tall_cabinet.notes: Tall cabinet with oven cutout opening for built-in oven installation.

oven_microwave_cabinet.name: Oven Microwave Tall Cabinet
oven_microwave_cabinet.notes: Tall cabinet with oven and microwave cutout openings.

flush_inset_oven_tall.name: Flush Inset Oven Tall Cabinet
flush_inset_oven_tall.notes: Flush inset tall cabinet for seamless oven installation.

wall_end_panel.name: Wall End Panel
wall_end_panel.notes: Decorative end panel for wall cabinets. 3/4, 1.5, or 3 inch thickness. 13 inch standard depth.

base_end_panel.name: Base End Panel
base_end_panel.notes: Decorative end panel for base cabinets. 3/4, 1.5, or 3 inch thickness. 24 inch depth.

vanity_end_panel.name: Vanity End Panel
vanity_end_panel.notes: Decorative end panel for vanity cabinets. 3/4, 1.5, or 3 inch thickness. 21 inch depth.

refrigerator_end_panel.name: Refrigerator End Panel
refrigerator_end_panel.notes: Decorative end panel for tall cabinets. 3/4, 1.5, or 3 inch thickness. 24, 27, or 30 inch depth.

flush_wall_end_panel.name: Flush Wall End Panel
flush_wall_end_panel.notes: Flush-mount wall end panel. 3/4 inch thick, 13.875 inch depth for seamless integration.

flush_base_end_panel.name: Flush Base End Panel
flush_base_end_panel.notes: Flush-mount base end panel. 3/4 inch thick, 24.875 inch depth.

flush_vanity_end_panel.name: Flush Vanity End Panel
flush_vanity_end_panel.notes: Flush-mount vanity end panel. 3/4 inch thick, 21.875 inch depth.

flush_refrigerator_end_panel.name: Flush Refrigerator End Panel
flush_refrigerator_end_panel.notes: Flush-mount refrigerator end panel for 30-inch deep appliance. 3/4 inch thick.

end_panel_returns.name: Base End Panel with 6-inch Returns
end_panel_returns.notes: Base end panel with 6.75-inch return for flush inset appliance installation.

end_panel_returns.name: Refrigerator End Panel with 6-inch Returns
end_panel_returns.notes: Refrigerator end panel with 6.75-inch return for appliance integration.

filler.name: Filler Strip
filler.notes: Thin filler strips 3 or 6 inches wide. Various heights for gap bridging.

overlay_filler.name: Overlay Filler
overlay_filler.notes: Overlay filler strips for covering gaps between cabinet groups.

column.name: Wall Column
column.notes: 3-inch wall column with 1.5-inch wide flutes and 0.25-inch depth.

column.name: Base Column
column.notes: 3-inch base column with 1.5-inch wide flutes. Multiple height options.

column.name: Utility Column
column.notes: 3-inch utility column with 1.5-inch wide flutes for tall cabinet runs.

notes.installation: All base cabinets include 4.5-inch toe kick. Total height to countertop is 34.5 inches. Add 1.5-inch countertop for 36-inch total counter height.
notes.mounting: Standard wall cabinet mounting height is 54 inches from floor (18 inches above 36-inch counter).
notes.corners: Blind corner widths are actual dimensions. Blind side pulls 3-4 inches into corner. Mullion is 7.5 inches exposed. Opening is 18.75 inches.
notes.diagonals: Diagonal corner bases are 45-degree angles with 24-inch depth each wall. Width is measured along wall (not diagonal).
notes.rightAngles: Right angle corners are 24 inches deep each direction, require wall space on both sides. Some models have expandable legs.
notes.appliances: Refrigerator wall cabinets are 24, 27, or 30 inches deep to sit flush with appliance. Oven and cooktop bases require specific cutouts.
notes.specialization: Wine cabinets, waste bins, and organizers have specific dimensions. Wine racks are 13 inches deep (not 24).
notes.depths: Most utility/tall cabinets available in 24, 27, or 30 inch depths. Some restrictions apply (e.g., pantry racks limited to 24 inch).
